hero.subtitle: SGP represents Paraguayan and international phonographic producers and self-managed artists through our global agreements.

pago.title: Get paid
pago.description: If you produce music, you have the right to collect whenever your work is used. We collect royalties in Paraguay and around the world through our global agreements.

licencia.title: Get a licence
licencia.description: If you use recorded music in your business, radio, TV or online service, you need to obtain an SGP licence. Protect your activity and support creators.

regalias.title: Royalties Portal
regalias.description: Manage the collection of your phonographic rights

licencias.title: Licensing
licencias.description: Calculate and pay your music usage licence

repertorio.title: Repertoire
repertorio.description: Search the database of registered works

partners.title: We work on behalf of
partners.subtitle: We represent major labels, producers and self-managed artists who trust SGP.

newsPreview.title: News
newsPreview.subtitle: Artists, ranking, industry and IFPI updates

artistOfMonth.title: Artist of the Month
artistOfMonth.description: Every month we highlight a Paraguayan artist or producer who stands out for their talent, trajectory and impact on the national phonographic industry.
artistOfMonth.featured: Paraguayan artist recognised for their contribution to the phonographic industry

rankingSGP.title: SGP Ranking
rankingSGP.description: The official ranking of the most-streamed artists and producers in Paraguay, based on data from all streaming platforms.

footer.description: Collective management society for phonographic producers of Paraguay.

hero.title: Licences
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know to legally use music in your business

radio.title: Broadcasting
radio.description: For AM and FM radio stations, open television channels and cable television operators that broadcast recorded music in their programming.

comercio.title: Permanent Venues
comercio.description: For businesses and public establishments that play recorded music as part of their daily activity: bars, restaurants, stores, gyms, hotels, malls and any venue with regular operation.

digital.title: Internet Licenses
digital.description: For services that transmit music over the internet: radio and TV Simulcasting, online radio and TV Webcasting, website background music and music services for commercial venues.

eventos.title: Events
eventos.description: For organizers of occasional events that use recorded music: family celebrations, business and corporate events, shows, concerts, dances, festivals, fairs and any occasional activity with an audience.

calculator.title: Calculate your licence
calculator.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll send you a personalised quote

fields.mensajePlaceholder: Additional details about your music use...

calculator.success: Your request was sent! The SGP team will contact you soon.
calculator.error: There was an error. Please try again.

tarifarioBanner.title: Tariff calculator for venues
tarifarioBanner.description: Estimate your indicative monthly license fee by business type. Calculation runs on our servers; the result is for reference until SGP confirms your details.

pagopar.title: Pay your licence online
pagopar.subtitle: Use Pagopar to pay quickly and securely. Special discount for online payment.
pagopar.recurrente: Enable recurring payments and never miss a renewal

hero.title: Royalties for producers
hero.subtitle: Receive what you're owed for every play of your music in Paraguay and worldwide

registro.title: Register your repertoire
registro.description: Enrol your phonographic productions with SGP with all necessary information.

monitoreo.title: We monitor usage
monitoreo.description: SGP monitors the use of your music on radio, TV, platforms and events in Paraguay.

recaudacion.title: We collect royalties
recaudacion.description: We collect licences from music users and distribute the proceeds.

pago.title: We pay you
pago.description: You receive your royalty payment directly to your account, transparently.

convenios.title: International reach
convenios.subtitle: Through our global agreements, your rights are represented in Paraguay and around the world.

cta.title: Want to register?
cta.subtitle: Contact us and an SGP representative will guide you through the process.

hero.title: ISRC Code
hero.subtitle: The International Standard Recording Code is the unique identifier for each phonogram

whatIs.title: What is ISRC?
whatIs.description: The ISRC (International Standard Recording Code) is a 12-character code that uniquely identifies each sound recording or music video internationally. SGP is the national ISRC registration agency in Paraguay.

whyNeed.title: Why do you need an ISRC?

items.identificacion: Identifies your recording on any platform worldwide
items.regalias: Facilitates royalty collection on digital platforms
items.streaming: Required for distribution on Spotify, Apple Music, etc.

form.title: Request your ISRC code
form.success: Request received! We'll contact you within 48 hours.
form.error: There was an error. Please try again.

hero.title: About SGP
hero.subtitle: Protecting the rights of Paraguayan phonographic producers since our founding

mision.title: Our mission
mision.description: SGP is a private entity dedicated to the collective management of phonographic producers' rights in Paraguay. We represent national and international producers, ensuring they receive fair compensation for the use of their works.

ifpiWipo.title: Global agreements
ifpiWipo.description: SGP works with international allies to represent Paraguayan producers and international repertoires through its global agreements.

marcoLegal.title: Legal framework
marcoLegal.description: SGP operates under the framework of Law No. 1328/98 on Copyright and Related Rights of Paraguay, which establishes the protection of phonographic producers' rights.

hero.title: News
hero.subtitle: The latest from the phonographic industry and SGP

hero.title: Awards
hero.subtitle: Propya Awards and SGP Awards celebrating the impact of Paraguayan music

streaming.title: Streaming Awards
streaming.description: SGP presents awards to Paraguayan artists and producers who reach significant milestones on streaming platforms such as Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube and more.

propya.title: Propya Awards
propya.description: The Propya Awards are the Paraguayan phonographic industry prizes, organised by SGP to recognise excellence in national music production.

hero.title: Contact
hero.subtitle: We're here to help. Get in touch through any of these channels.

form.title: Send us a message
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: There was an error. Please try again.

tarifarioPage.metaDescription: Get an estimated monthly music license fee for your venue in Paraguay.

hero.title: Tariffs
hero.subtitle: License fee calculator for music use in venues and businesses

tarifarioPage.intro: Choose your business type, fill in your venue details, and get an estimate in Guaraníes. For a formal quote, contact SGP’s commercial team.

tarifario.title: Tariff Calculator
tarifario.subtitle: Estimate your monthly license fee in 4 simple steps
tarifario.disclaimer: This is an estimated value. SGP will confirm the final tariff after verifying the declared data.

summary.title: Calculation summary
summary.empty: Fill in the details to get the estimated tariff.
summary.noticeGastronomiaNoche: When night shift is selected, if the venue operates with dancing or as a club, an additional entertainment license should be calculated.
summary.notice30Dias: When all 7 days of the week are selected, the monthly criterion uses 30 fixed days.
summary.noticeOficinas: For offices, the minimum tariff of Gs. 294,000 applies when the calculation does not exceed that amount.

fields.tipoLocalHelper: Choose an option to continue. You can filter long lists.
fields.seleccionarRubroPrimero: Select a category first to see available business types.

tarifario.horasEstandar: Standard {horas}h per day applies for this business type

medio.label: What medium do you use for music?
medio.fijo: For this type, speakers (0.15) always apply

gastronomia.baileTitle: Do your customers dance at any time or day of the week?
gastronomia.baileDesc: If at any point during the night the venue becomes a dance club, music is classified as indispensable and requires an additional license that is added on top of the one already calculated.

gimnasio.agregarAviso: Gym calculations start with a 7A service. If the gym offers another service, add it to accumulate tariffs by usage. When finished, the final total adds all loaded services.

error404.title: Page not found
error404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

tarifarioHub.title: Tariff Calculator
tarifarioHub.subtitle: Select the license type that matches your activity

radiodifusion.desc: For AM and FM radio stations, open television channels and cable television operators that broadcast recorded music in their programming.

locales.title: Permanent Venues
locales.desc: For businesses and public establishments that play recorded music as part of their daily activity: bars, restaurants, stores, gyms, hotels, malls and any venue with regular operation.

internet.title: Internet Licenses

eventos.title: Events

radiodifusion.title: Broadcasting
radiodifusion.subtitle: Estimate the monthly tariff for radio, TV and cable based on your revenue and music usage

medios.tv_cableDesc: Cable, closed signals, streaming and on-demand

zona.interiorDesc: All other departments and cities in the country

categorias.titulo: What percentage of your programming is music?

fields.ingresosHelp: Revenue from advertising and/or subscriber fees. If you have no revenue, leave it at 0 and the minimum tariff for your category will apply.
fields.prontoPagoDesc: Paying within 15 days of the following month gives you an additional 10% discount

summary.title: Calculation summary
summary.empty: Complete the details to get the estimated tariff.

radiodifusion.aplicaMinimo: The minimum tariff for your category applies
radiodifusion.notaSimulcasting: Do you also stream online? Simulcasting requires an additional license, independent from traditional radio or TV.
radiodifusion.disclaimer: This value is an indicative estimate. SGP will confirm the final tariff after verifying the declared data.
radiodifusion.notaProntoPago: You can benefit from a 10% discount by paying the license for the immediately preceding month before the 15th of each month. The discount is applied when confirming and starting the payment process.

internetLic.title: Internet Licenses
internetLic.subtitle: Simulcasting, Webcasting, website background music and venue music services

servicios.simulcastingDesc: Radio or TV also transmitted over the internet, alongside the traditional signal
servicios.webcastingDesc: Radio or TV exclusively online, with no traditional base signal
servicios.ambientacionDesc: Website background music with non-interactive playback
servicios.musicalizacionDesc: Background music services for commercial venues

fields.visitasHelp: Number of monthly visits to the service URL
fields.ingresosHelp: If you have no revenue, leave it at 0 and the corresponding minimum will apply.
fields.bocasHelp: Total number of venues or locations where the service is provided

summary.title: Calculation summary
summary.empty: Complete the details to get the estimated tariff.

internetLic.cotizacionNota: USD amounts are settled at the BCP exchange rate of the last business day of the month prior to the music usage.
internetLic.notaSimulcasting: Simulcasting does not replace the traditional radio or TV license: it is an additional, independent license. A station broadcasting over the air and online needs both.
internetLic.disclaimer: This value is an indicative estimate. SGP will confirm the final tariff after verifying the declared data.
